title: Ovalbook
description: A modpack that is like 99% percent client side, mostly optimizations and stuff. (The only server side mods are terralith, tectonic, and DnT
body:
A lightweight, performance friendly modpack that I made to play with some friends.

!This modpack contains a custom reasource pack from vanilla tweaks. You can make a texture pack OR data pack to your own liking there at the [Vanilla Tweaks Website](https://vanillatweaks.net/)!

## Performance
We have provided a range of performance mods, so that even on a low end computer, you should be able to run minecraft _Smoothly_. Some performance mods include
-Sodium
- Entity Culling Features
- Lithium

## QoL
This modpack also contains many QoL mods, which provide a better experience, client side. Some of these include
- Continuity - Connected textures!
- More particles
- Zoomify






Also, you should probably download an actually quality modpack, like Fabulously optimized. I made this so that I could have some things that I wanted when playing minecraft, so this probably isn't the best choice for everyone. Go look around, and find something that fits you.
